text: <par>For the same ‘tooth’ + ‘flesh’ combination, cf. Chinese <latinform>yá ròu</latinform> ‘gums’.</par>
<par>M2: p? or 1013? M3: 1388? See above 10146 etc.</par>
<par>1390?? no division of M4 r-kho?. <latinform>qo</latinform> cf. earlier?? (or throughout prfx?)</par>
<par>Loan (?) from WT <latinform>mtshan</latinform> ‘mark, token, badge; genitals’—see Jäschke p. 454.</par>
